opportunities.specific_product: NuWallpaper Peel & Stick Faux Wood Plank Wallpaper
opportunities.transformation_hook: Renter turned bare bathroom wall into real-looking wood for $32
opportunities.before_state: Flat, builder-beige bathroom wall that screams rental apartment
opportunities.after_state: Warm faux-wood accent wall guests ask about — looks permanent, peels off clean
buyer_intent_keywords: peel and stick wood wallpaper bathroom
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is actively publishing rental DIY bathroom content where the creator's faux-wood wallpaper goes viral because followers 'always think it's real wood' — that exact social proof loop is the Reel.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia Covers waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Destroyed pet-hair couch looked brand new for $49 — no new sofa
opportunities.before_state: Shredded, fur-covered couch renters feel stuck with — too expensive to replace
opportunities.after_state: Taut, waterproof cover that looks like a new sofa and wipes clean instantly
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's June rental content is anchored on 'not buying new furniture' — sofa covers are the exact high-intent solution this audience lands on, and Mamma Mia's 24–30% commission makes this the highest-value unit in the portfolio.

opportunities.specific_product: Art3d Smart Tiles Peel & Stick Subway Backsplash
opportunities.transformation_hook: Rental kitchen got a real backsplash in 30 min for $28 — no grout
opportunities.before_state: Bare painted drywall behind the stove that dates the entire kitchen
opportunities.after_state: Clean subway tile backsplash that adds hundreds to perceived value instantly
buyer_intent_keywords: peel and stick backsplash tiles kitchen
subway tile peel and stick rental
peel and stick tile wall kitchen
opportunities.why_now: Better Homes & Gardens explicitly called out peel-and-stick tiles in a June kitchen timelessness editorial, priming search intent right as summer renovation season peaks.

opportunities.product_category: dorm room bedding + side sleeper pillow
opportunities.specific_product: Twin XL dorm comforter set + Eli & Elm cotton side sleeper pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Drab dorm room went full Pinterest aesthetic for $67 before move-in
opportunities.before_state: Stark, institutional dorm room with bare mattress and fluorescent lighting
opportunities.after_state: Curated, colorful dorm bedroom with coordinated bedding and an ergonomic pillow setup
buyer_intent_keywords: college bed in a bag twin xl
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy published explicit dorm decor content today — June is the start of the back-to-school Amazon shopping window for August move-in, and Eli & Elm's 20% commission on the pillow anchors the bundle economics.

opportunities.specific_product: mDesign lazy susan turntable + adjustable drawer divider set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Chaotic kitchen cabinets turned chef-ready in 10 min for $34
opportunities.before_state: Stuffed, avalanche-prone cabinets where nothing is findable and half the pantry expires unseen
opportunities.after_state: Labeled, rotating turntable shelves where every item is visible and reachable in one move
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple published a 'declutter your cabinets' feature today that directly names jars and containers as the lever — purchase intent is activated and searching for the exact products shown in this Reel format.
